role: Senior Analytics Engineer - Crypto and Payments

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Construct data models; Design MoonPay-wide reconciliation approaches; robust data infrastructure
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Focus on robust infrastructure and reconciliation systems indicates rigour and architecture over velocity.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: Fintech with crypto and fiat reconciliation, accounting, and audits—explicitly financial/regulatory context.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Develop 'The Ledger' system; building robust data infrastructure; early-stage reconciliation needs
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Early: Focus on building foundational systems ('The Ledger') and robust infrastructure suggests establishing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Construct data models; Develop 'The Ledger' system; Design MoonPay-wide reconciliation approaches; Perform analysis and build solutions
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific system names ('The Ledger') and detailed reconciliation context indicate hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: accounting and financial planning; finance team; accounting team; financial reporting
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Finance, accounting, and financial reporting focus indicate finance orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Ownership verbs (develop systems, design approaches, architect models) indicate strategic responsibility.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or infrastructure expectations.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing frameworks, data quality, or validation practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: reconciliation and reporting; accounting; audits; payment reconciliation; crypto delivery timing
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: Reconciliation, accounting, audits, and regulatory compliance language dominates.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop 'The Ledger' system; building robust data infrastructure; Design MoonPay-wide reconciliation approaches
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Building foundational systems from scratch suggests greenfield.
